detail.instructions: Add iter_mut and implement IntoIterator for &mut OrderLines, yielding &mut OrderLine values without exposing the inner Vec.

hints.body: Mutable iteration should borrow the wrapper mutably.
Yield &mut OrderLine so callers can update line fields in place.
Delegate the IntoIterator implementation to iter_mut.

detail.completionExplanation: The wrapper supports controlled in-place updates while preserving ownership of the collection.
